fields.description:
What is Leapsome?

Leapsome is the AI-powered people platform revolutionizing HR for modern teams. Leapsome drives HR excellence and empowers high-performing teams by automating, connecting, and simplifying every HR process across the employee lifecycle — from onboarding and performance management to engagement and development. Built with ease of use in mind, our platform ensures high adoption by employees, managers, and People teams alike.


Our purpose is to make work fulfilling for everyone, and our vision is to reshape the future of work by being the leading People platform for HR excellence and high-performing teams. We enable companies to create environments where people can achieve their goals, learn and grow together, and build genuine motivation & engagement.


Trusted by thousands of organizations globally, Leapsome secured $60 million in Series A funding led by Insight Partners in March 2022. This funding allowed us to further develop our intelligent platform, create exceptional employee experiences, and expand into the US market.


It’s an incredibly exciting time to join Leapsome and be part of reshaping the future of work!


YOUR OPPORTUNITY

As a Junior Brand and Marketing Designer at Leapsome, you’ll be an essential part of our design team, working side-by-side with our Design Lead to bring ideas to life across brand and marketing touch points. This role is specifically designed for a designer early in their career who understands the unique pace and needs of a B2B product-focused environment.

You won’t just “execute briefs”; you’ll help shape how we design faster and smarter by exploring, testing, and implementing AI-powered design tools. If you love visual storytelling within a structured brand framework, thrive in a high-impact setting, and understand the difference between agency-style output and building a cohesive product brand, this role is for you.

This position is initially offered as a 1-year fixed-term contract, with the potential for extension or transition to a permanent position based on performance and business needs


WHAT IS YOUR JOB?

 - Execute B2B Marketing Assets: Support a wide range of tasks including LinkedIn ads, webinar slides, campaign visuals, and presentations that align strictly with Leapsome’s brand guidelines.

 - Product-Focused Design: Apply your design skills to a product-centric environment, focusing on consistency and the long-term visual evolution of our brand rather than one-off agency projects.

 - You transform concepts into high-fidelity visuals using Adobe Creative Suite. Whether it’s pixel-perfect assets or collaborating on UI/UX projects in Figma, I’m the engine behind the design team’s high-quality output.

 - AI Experimentation:Take the lead in exploring AI design tools (e.g., Midjourney, Firefly), testing and comparing what works best, and figuring out which are actually worth pursuing. Turn what you learn into clear recommendations on what we should use, when to use it, and how it helps us move faster without losing quality.

 - Iterate at Pace: Continuously refine assets based on feedback, demonstrating high adaptability and the ability to maintain quality in a fast-paced scale-up environment.

 - Structured Communication: Clearly articulate your design decisions and project progress, ensuring alignment across the marketing and design teams.


WHO ARE WE LOOKING FOR?

 - B2B Experience: You have foundational experience in graphic design, ideally within a B2B marketing team or product-focused setting (through internships or junior roles).

 - Adobe Creative Suite Mastery: Drive high-quality visual output using Adobe Creative Suite, with Figma as a valuable secondary tool for UI/UX design and collaboration with the Design Lead.

 - Driving Innovation through AI: Proactively explore and implement AI-powered tools (e.g., Midjourney, Firefly), bringing fresh thinking on how AI can improve efficiency, expand creative possibilities, and shape the future of our design practice.

 - Adaptable & Fast-Paced: You thrive in environments where priorities move quickly and you can maintain structure under pressure.

 - Rapid Learner: Bring clear examples of quickly picking up new skills or tools—often through self-directed learning—combined with strong coachability and a drive to continuously improve

 - Strong Fundamentals: You have a sharp eye for typography, layout, and composition, with the ability to follow and implement brand constraints while remaining creative.



Leapsome’s values

We stay true to our values in everything we do at Leapsome. 

 - Impact is everything — We aim high, focus on the outcomes that matter and say no to the rest.

 - Speed is our advantage — We move fast with intent — simplifying, automating, and learning as we go.

 - Owners without egos — We trust owners and expect excellence in return. We take responsibility individually, support each other, and win as a team.

 - Candid is kind — We speak up early and respectfully. We assume good intent, stay curious, and care about each other’s growth.
   
   

Excited to be part of Leapsome? 😊

Just send us your CV. You won't need to input any information already mentioned on your CV later on - promise! 🤙

A cover letter isn’t necessary, but we’d really appreciate a brief answer to these questions: Why Leapsome? Why you?

We look forward to getting to know you!

You can find more about what our colleagues think about working at Leapsome here 👉 ✨✨✨ Glassdoor https://www.glassdoor.com/Reviews/Leapsome-Reviews-E2368390.htm?countryRedirect=true ✨✨✨ Kununu https://www.kununu.com/de/leapsome2✨✨✨

Don’t meet every single requirement? Studies have shown that women and people of color are less likely to apply for jobs unless they meet every qualification. If you’re excited about this role but your experience doesn’t align perfectly with every qualification in the job description, we encourage you to apply anyways. You may be just the right candidate for this or other roles.


Help us make work fulfilling for everyone!

At Leapsome, we want work to be the best it can be for everyone. We help companies create environments where people can achieve shared goals, build authentic relationships, learn, and grow together.

Put simply; our purpose is to make work fulfilling for everyone. And we know how to get there. But we can only do this by “walking our talk” and building a diverse and inclusive company where people — not just the business — thrive.



Apply now 👇 or keep scrolling to read more about what makes Leapsome a unique workplace!
fields.title: Junior Brand and Marketing Designer (d/f/m)
